---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or producing wrong results
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

```
# Minimal code or API call that reproduces the issue
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Paste error messages, stack traces, or incorrect output.

## Environment

- Python version: (e.g. 3.11.9)
- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- mc-trader version / git commit: (e.g. `git rev-parse --short HEAD`)
- Key dependency versions: (`pip show fastapi numpy scipy`)

## Additional context

Any other context (data screenshots, charts, logs) that might help diagnose the issue.
